message:
feat(itertools): Add product function with repeat keyword argument

- Add productRepeat runtime helper for cartesian product with repetition
- Add product function to Lib/itertools.zig that handles PyObject and slices
- Handle itertools.product(iter, repeat=N) in codegen dispatch
- Add collections module to runtime.Lib struct
- Disable broken _collections_abc.zig import (anytype return types invalid)
- Make emitIter public for cross-module use

This enables test_tuple.py which heavily uses itertools.product(range(N), repeat=M)
